title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF JOSE PANGANIBAN, PROVINCE OF CATANDUANES, TO PAYO.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4065 / 53 OG No. 15, 4778 (August 15, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1654, June 20, 1957 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF JOSE PANGANIBAN, PROVINCE OF CATANDUANES, TO PAYO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION. 1. The name of the Municipality of Jose Panganiban, Province of Catanduanes, is changed to Payo.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 20, 1957.
